review: The bangles arrived with one noticeably bent out of shape. I reached out to the seller who was responsive and offered a replacement but I'm disappointed with the original packaging - they were just tossed in a padded envelope. The designs are beautiful though so I'm hopeful the replacement set will arrive safely.

Love this walking stick! The diamond willow patterns are so unique - like nature's own artwork. Perfectly balanced and comfortable to hold on long hikes. Had it custom-sized to my height and it's spot on. Highly recommend.

This grain bowl is a work of art. The wood grain has so much depth and character. It's huge - perfect for serving salads at dinner parties! Shipped fast and arrived perfectly packaged with extra padding. You can tell the maker really cares.

These little tree bells are adorable! Each one is painted with such care and the colors are festive without being gaudy. Bought a dozen for the family Christmas tree and everyone wanted to know where I got them. Perfect stocking stuffers.

As a PNW native I'm picky about salmon art and this wall mount delivers! The form is dynamic - it really captures a salmon mid-leap. The painted details on the scales catch the light beautifully. Looks perfect above our mantel.

Absolutely stunning mortar and pestle set! The red cedar has such a rich color and the carving work is exquisite. It's heavy and sturdy - clearly built to last. The grain pattern on mine is beautiful. Will definitely be ordering more pieces from this shop!

Beautiful pressed flower frame — perfect for the living room. The craftsmanship is evident and it arrived well packed. My wife loved it as an anniversary gift. The dried flowers are bright and the frame is solid wood.
Really cozy beanie, exactly as described. The wool is soft and it keeps my head warm on cold Detroit mornings. Shipping was fast. Would order again.

This hand-bound notebook is gorgeous. The stitching is tight and the pages feel premium. I use it for journaling every morning. The seller even included a handwritten thank-you note which was a lovely touch.

The tea light holder creates the most wonderful warm glow in the evenings. Heavy cast iron, well finished. It sits on our dining table and gets compliments every time we have guests. Excellent quality from this Detroit craftsperson.

Ordered this maple cutting board as a Christmas gift for my parents. It's thick, well oiled, and beautifully finished. The grain pattern is gorgeous. Parents absolutely loved it �� said it was the best cutting board they've ever had.

Lovely lavender candle, strong scent that fills the room without being overwhelming. The soy wax burns cleanly. I bought three for holiday gifts. Only minor issue was one lid was a bit loose but no big deal.

Ordered these tea towels for holiday gift bags. The hand-printed designs are charming and the linen is thick and absorbent. Packed neatly and arrived ahead of schedule. Will definitely be back for more.

What a beautiful set of mugs! Each one is truly unique with its own speckle pattern. The glaze is rich and the weight feels good in the hand. My morning coffee tastes better just because I'm using these. Highly recommend this Detroit artist.

Personalized leather bookmark arrived beautifully stamped with my name. The leather is thick and supple. Perfect for my Bible and the L'Amour westerns I read. Ordered two more for family. Very satisfied with this purchase.
